title: Relatively Optimized
description: Relatively optimized is just a pack for a bit more FPS and a handful of other things to make Minecraft more of a looker, yet keep it still look like Minecraft.
body: Relatively Optimized is a pack made to give you a bit more FPS while keeping Minecraft’s classic charm intact. It adds a handful of tweaks and enhancements to make the game look better and run smoother — all without losing that familiar Minecraft feel.
